content.text: Cluster is running with 5 workers. Let me check the traffic generator logs to see current phase.

input.description: Check traffic generator logs for current phase

content.content:
PHASE 1: baseline load (5 workers sufficient) - 60s
LAG=2000 LATENCY=50ms

tool_use_result.stdout:
PHASE 1: baseline load (5 workers sufficient) - 60s
LAG=2000 LATENCY=50ms

content.text: Phase 1 is running — baseline load, 5 workers sufficient. Now I'll poll continuously, watching for phase transitions and scaling accordingly.

input.command:
# Poll traffic generator logs every 10 seconds for up to 5 minutes, watching for phase transitions
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  echo "=== Poll $i at $(date '+%H:%M:%S') ==="
  LOGS=$(kubectl logs -n spark-streaming -l app=traffic-generator --tail=5 2>&1)
  echo "$LOGS"
  
  # Check for phase transitions
  if echo "$LOGS" | grep -q "PHASE 2"; then
    echo ">>> PHASE 2 DETECTED — scaling to 10 workers"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=10
    echo ">>> Scaled to 10 workers"
    break
  fi
  
  sleep 10
done
echo "=== Phase check loop done ==="
input.description: Poll for Phase 2 transition and scale to 10 workers

input.description: Verify worker count after Phase 2 scaling

input.command:
# Poll for Phase 3 transition and scale to 20 workers
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  echo "=== Poll $i at $(date '+%H:%M:%S') ==="
  LOGS=$(kubectl logs -n spark-streaming -l app=traffic-generator --tail=5 2>&1)
  echo "$LOGS"
  
  if echo "$LOGS" | grep -q "PHASE 3"; then
    echo ">>> PHASE 3 DETECTED — scaling to 20 workers"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=20
    echo ">>> Scaled to 20 workers"
    break
  fi
  
  sleep 10
done
echo "=== Phase 3 check loop done ==="
input.description: Poll for Phase 3 transition and scale to 20 workers

content.text: Phase 3 detected with LAG=75000 (critical). Scaled to 20 workers. Now polling for Phase 4 cooldown.

input.command: kubectl get deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}' 2>&1 && echo ""
input.description: Verify worker count after Phase 3 scaling

input.command:
# Poll for Phase 4 cooldown and scale back to 5 workers
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  echo "=== Poll $i at $(date '+%H:%M:%S') ==="
  LOGS=$(kubectl logs -n spark-streaming -l app=traffic-generator --tail=5 2>&1)
  echo "$LOGS"
  
  if echo "$LOGS" | grep -q "PHASE 4"; then
    echo ">>> PHASE 4 DETECTED — scaling back to 5 workers"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=5
    echo ">>> Scaled to 5 workers"
    break
  fi
  
  sleep 10
done
echo "=== Phase 4 check loop done ==="
input.description: Poll for Phase 4 cooldown and scale back to 5 workers

description: Poll for Phase 4 cooldown and scale back to 5 workers
